name: Marinated Mushroom and Mixed Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can hearts of palm, sliced into 1/4 inch pieces
2 medium Vidalia onions, cut into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the artichoke hearts, hearts of palm, olives, pimentos, mushrooms and onions in a large glass container with lid.
2 Combine the dressing ingredients in a small bowl.
3 Pour the dressing over the vegetables and stir to coat evenly.
4 Cover and refrigerate the salad to marinate overnight.
5 Remove the salad from the marinade using a slotted spoon and transfer it to a serving bowl lined with lettuce leaves.
